title: oxalis cognita
intro: Oxalis cognita, also known as the small-flowered wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the oxalis genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Oxalis cognita can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its effects.
